# Silent H

> Silent H is a modern Mexican restaurant and agave cocktail lounge at 416 West 13th Street in NYC's Meatpacking District. Executive Chef Gerardo Álvarez Saucedo serves elevated Mexican food; the hidden late-night lounge Aitch pours 50+ tequilas and mezcals with guest DJs Thursday to Sunday.

## Key facts
- Location: 416 West 13th Street, New York, NY 10014, USA (Meatpacking District)
- Phone: +1 416-900-3535
- Hours: Dinner Tuesday to Sunday from 5pm; happy hour daily 5-7pm ($10 margaritas)
- Cuisine: Modern Mexican
- Executive Chef: Gerardo Álvarez Saucedo
- Reservations: https://www.opentable.ca/r/silent-h-toronto

## Pages
- [Menu](https://www.silenthnyc.com/menu): Modern Mexican food, tacos, and cocktails
- [Happy Hour](https://www.silenthnyc.com/happy-hour): Daily 5-7pm, $10 margaritas and $4 bites
- [Aitch](https://www.silenthnyc.com/aitch): Late-night agave cocktail lounge with 50+ tequilas and mezcals
- [Events & Private Dining](https://www.silenthnyc.com/events): Private events and full buyouts
- [Our Story](https://www.silenthnyc.com/story): About Silent H and Chef Gerardo Álvarez Saucedo
- [FAQ](https://www.silenthnyc.com/faq): Common questions about visiting Silent H
- [Blog](https://www.silenthnyc.com/blogs): Guides to Mexican food, agave spirits, and NYC dining

## Reservations
Book a table at https://www.opentable.ca/r/silent-h-toronto or call +1 416-900-3535.
